name: aiboarding
description: Onboard AI agents like fresh engineers: generates and maintains AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md with drift tracking, compression, and auditing.

interface.shortDescription: Generate, maintain, compress, and audit AI-agent onboarding files.
interface.longDescription: AIBoarding creates and maintains standard AI-agent onboarding files for repositories. It generates AGENTS.md, keeps CLAUDE.md as a thin loader, tracks drift through sidecar state, offers compression and audit skills, and ships deterministic hook templates for Claude Code lifecycle nudges.
defaultPrompt: Create onboarding files for this repository.
Audit my AGENTS.md for stale or bloated guidance.
Update the onboarding docs after recent commits.
